title: MinecraftWebhook
description: A simple, customisable mod to relay player joins, leaving, chatting and also server states via a Discord webhook
body:
### **MinecraftWebhook is a easy to use and customisable mod that relays in-game events to a Discord Webhook.**

_You can relay:_
- Player joins
- Player leaves
- Player getting an advancement
- Player dying
- Player chat messages
- Server shutdowns
- Server started

MinecraftWebhook only currently supports Forge 1.12.2 but I am open for version requests on [GitHub issues](https://github.com/WaviestBalloon/MinecraftWebhook/issues) and I'll try to support it.

### Need help with setup?

[Read the README file on Github here!](https://github.com/WaviestBalloon/MinecraftWebhook#how-to-setup)

![The mod in action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38b2331f638292bd181cf7d283dc6c9ab7f9a1b1.png)
